2603.17425.title: Proactive Knowledge Inquiry in Doctor-Patient Dialogue: Stateful Extraction, Belief Updating, and Path-Aware Action Planning
2603.17425.paper_summary: Most automated electronic medical record (EMR) pipelines remain output-oriented: they transcribe, extract, and summarize after the consultation, but they do not explicitly model what is already known, what is still missing, which uncertainty matters most, or what question or recommendation should come next. We formulate doctor-patient dialogue as a proactive knowledge-inquiry problem under partial observability. The proposed framework combines stateful extraction, sequential belief updating, gap-aware state modeling, hybrid retrieval over objectified medical knowledge, and a POMDP-lite action planner. Instead of treating the EMR as the only target artifact, the framework treats documentation as the structured projection of an ongoing inquiry loop. To make the formulation concrete, we report a controlled pilot evaluation on ten standardized multi-turn dialogues together with a 300-query retrieval benchmark aggregated across dialogues. On this pilot protocol, the full framework reaches 83.3% coverage, 80.0% risk recall, 81.4% structural completeness, and lower redundancy than the chunk-only and template-heavy interactive baselines. These pilot results do not establish clinical generalization; rather, they suggest that proactive inquiry may be methodologically interesting under tightly controlled conditions and can be viewed as a conceptually appealing formulation worth further investigation for dialogue-based EMR generation. This work should be read as a pilot concept demonstration under a controlled simulated setting rather than as evidence of clinical deployment readiness. No implication of clinical deployment readiness, clinical safety, or real-world clinical utility should be inferred from this pilot protocol.
2603.17425.paper_summary_zh: 大多數自動化電子病歷 (EMR) 管道仍然以輸出為導向：它們在諮詢後進行轉錄、提取和總結，但並未明確建模已知的內容、仍缺失的內容、最重要的不確定性，或下一步應該提出的問題或建議。我們將醫生-病人對話定義為在部分可觀察性下的主動知識探詢問題。所提出的框架結合了有狀態的提取、序列信念更新、關注差距的狀態建模、對物化醫療知識的混合檢索，以及一個簡化的 POMDP 行動規劃器。該框架並不將 EMR 視為唯一的目標產物，而是將文檔視為持續探詢循環的結構化投影。為了使這一表述具體化，我們報告了對十個標準化的多輪對話進行的受控初步評估，並提供了一個跨對話聚合的 300 查詢檢索基準。在這一初步協議中，完整框架達到了 83.3% 的覆蓋率、80.0% 的風險召回率、81.4% 的結構完整性，且比僅使用片段和模板重的互動基準具有更低的冗餘性。這些初步結果並未建立臨床泛化；相反，它們表明在嚴格控制的條件下，主動探詢可能在方法論上具有趣味，並且可以被視為一種概念上吸引人的表述，值得進一步調查以用於基於對話的 EMR 生成。這項工作應被視為在受控模擬環境下的初步概念示範，而不是臨床部署準備的證據。從這一初步協議中不應推斷出臨床部署準備、臨床安全或現實世界臨床效用的任何暗示。
2603.17425.author: Zhenhai Pan et.al.
2603.17425.authors: Zhenhai Pan, Yan Liu, Jia You
